_about.source: Prior authorized bug-bounty research (2026-05-12). The 35 findings below are pasted verbatim from the researcher's report; Mantis re-renders them through its FSM cascade + Merkle event log so the same dataset can be audited cryptographically.

findings.title: F-9 — Mass-assignment in PATCH /rest/v1/users allows any authenticated user to escalate to permissions=admin
findings.evidence: PATCH /rest/v1/users?id=eq.<self> body {"permissions":"admin"} returns HTTP 200 with the row showing permissions=admin. CWE-915 + CWE-269. CVSS 9.8.

findings.title: F-12 — Missing RLS on orders allows any authenticated user to read every tenant's orders
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/orders?select=*&limit=5 returns 118 cross-tenant orders including organization_id=3de390ed-... rows. CWE-285+CWE-639. CVSS 9.1.

findings.title: F-17 — Missing RLS on materials allows any authenticated user to delete every tenant's master ingredient rows
findings.evidence: DELETE /rest/v1/materials?id=eq.<victim_material_uuid> returns HTTP 200 with the deleted row. CWE-285+CWE-284. CVSS 9.1.

findings.title: F-18 — Missing RLS on system_settings allows any authenticated user to modify platform-wide margin and charge-account configuration
findings.evidence: PATCH /rest/v1/system_settings?key=eq.global_margin body {"value":{"margin_pct":0.001,"tenkara_charge_account":"attacker_routing"}} returns 200. CWE-285+CWE-732. CVSS 9.6.

findings.title: F-20 — Missing RLS on suppliers allows any authenticated user to read plaintext supplier-marketplace credentials cross-tenant
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/suppliers?select=*&limit=5 returns supplier rows including marketplace_credentials.password=ocean_secure_456 for PureOcean Naturals (org f99df3f6 — not attacker's). 235 supplier rows with plaintext creds. CWE-200+CWE-256+CWE-285. CVSS 9.8.

findings.title: F-27 — Missing RLS on formulas allows any authenticated user to read proprietary recipes cross-tenant
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/formulas?select=*&limit=5 returns formulas by user_id 1cd252f6 / 22eb4e7b / f3ffd5d8 — none matching attacker sub: Restaurant Medium Salsa, Chicken Stock, Vanilla Protein Smoothie Base, Daily Multivitamin Complex with full ingredient lists. CWE-200+CWE-285. CVSS 8.6.

findings.title: F-28 — Missing RLS on formulas allows any authenticated user to delete cross-tenant master formula rows
findings.evidence: DELETE /rest/v1/formulas?id=eq.<id> with attacker JWT returns HTTP 200 with the deleted row. CWE-285. CVSS 9.1.

findings.title: F-32 — Missing RLS on notifications allows any authenticated user to insert/update cross-tenant notifications (phishing-as-platform)
findings.evidence: POST /rest/v1/notifications body with user_id=, type=system, title="Action required", body="Re-authenticate" returns HTTP 201 with the inserted row. CWE-285+CWE-451. CVSS 9.0.

findings.title: F-33 — Missing authorization in RPC revert_order_split allows any authenticated user to mutate cross-tenant orders
findings.evidence: POST /rest/v1/rpc/revert_order_split body {"p_order_id":"<victim_order_uuid>"} returns HTTP 200; victim order's split state reverted. SECURITY DEFINER lacks membership check. CWE-285+CWE-862. CVSS 9.1.

findings.title: F-36 — Missing RLS on orders.status allows any authenticated user to mark orders as paid without paying Stripe
findings.evidence: PATCH /rest/v1/orders?id=eq.<own_order> body {"status":"paid","stripe_session_id":"FAKE-PAID-NO-PAYMENT","total_collected":50000} persisted in production. Confirmed via re-read: rows still present with stripe_session_id=FAKE-PAID-NO-PAYMENT and FAKE-CROSS-TENANT total_collected=99999999. CWE-840+CWE-285. CVSS 9.1.

findings.title: F-6 — Missing org-scope check on /api/materials-view allows authenticated user to read cross-tenant materials including supplier credentials
findings.evidence: GET /api/materials-view?orgId=f99df3f6-... with attacker session (member of 32aa9695-...) returns HTTP 200 with materials from foreign org including marketplace_credentials. CWE-285+CWE-639. CVSS 9.1.

findings.title: F-1 — IDOR in GET /api/settings-view?userId= allows authenticated user to read any user's settings
findings.evidence: GET /api/settings-view?userId=<victim_uuid> with attacker session returns victim settings JSON including notification preferences and integration tokens. CWE-639. CVSS 7.7.

findings.title: F-2 — Missing RLS on users allows authenticated user to enumerate emails, org_ids, and admin permissions
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/users?select=* returns 36+ user rows with email, organization_id, permissions, stripe_customer_id. Recon source for F-9. CWE-200+CWE-285. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-3 — Missing RLS on organizations allows authenticated user to read every tenant's Nylas grant_id and connected_email
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/organizations?select=* returns 20 orgs with connected_email and Nylas grant_id. Direct enabler for F-19. CWE-200+CWE-285. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-7 — Open Supabase signup at POST /auth/v1/signup allows unauthenticated attacker to obtain a tenant JWT
findings.evidence: POST /auth/v1/signup body {"email":"attacker+1@evil.tld","password":"Password123!"} returns HTTP 200 and JWT. Re-confirmed 2026-05-12. Keystone of every other finding. CWE-284. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-10 — Anon JWT can read full users table via GET /rest/v1/users (no auth required)
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/users?select=* with only the public apikey (no Bearer token) returns the full user list including emails and Stripe customer IDs. CWE-306+CWE-285. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-13 — Missing RLS on vendor_packets allows authenticated user to read full POC, credit, and bank reference data cross-tenant
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/vendor_packets?select=* returns vendor packets with point-of-contact names/phones, credit reference contacts, bank reference data for foreign tenants. CWE-200+CWE-285. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-15 — Missing RLS on materials write path allows authenticated user to lower any tenant's material price to $0.01
findings.evidence: PATCH /rest/v1/materials?id=eq.<victim_material_id> body {"price_per_unit":0.01} returns HTTP 200; quotes referencing the material now compute at near-zero cost. CWE-285+CWE-840. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-19 — Missing membership check on Nylas mailbox endpoints allows authenticated user to send mail as any tenant
findings.evidence: Combined with F-3 leaked grant_id, the Nylas-backed /api/mail/* routes accept arbitrary grant_id and impersonate any tenant's connected mailbox. CWE-285+CWE-639. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-22 — Missing RLS on document inventory allows authenticated user to read foreign org's document list
findings.evidence: Document-inventory endpoint returned Vitality Labs' full document listing to an attacker member of a different org. CWE-200+CWE-285. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-23 — Missing RLS on suppliers write allows authenticated user to PATCH/POST cross-tenant supplier rows (contact takeover)
findings.evidence: PATCH /rest/v1/suppliers?id=eq.<victim_supplier_id> body {"contact_email":"attacker@evil.tld"} returns HTTP 200. CWE-285. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-25 — Missing RLS allows authenticated user to INSERT phantom orders into any tenant's pipeline
findings.evidence: Phantom orders id=27e9826f-... with internal_notes="phantom order created by attacker" and id=dde2903e-... (FAKE-CROSS-TENANT) confirmed still present in production on 2026-05-12. CWE-285. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-31 — Missing RLS on notifications read allows authenticated user to read every tenant's notification stream
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/notifications?select=* returned business-sensitive price-change notifications (Agave Nectar, Almonds, Avocado Oil quotes) for foreign tenants. CWE-200+CWE-285. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-30 — Missing RLS exposes supplier PII and payment_terms cross-tenant
findings.evidence: Same suppliers query as F-20 returned BioFlora Sciences payment_terms (upfront=30, net_days=45, credit_line=12000) for org f99df3f6. CWE-200. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-34 — Missing membership check on signed-URL generation allows authenticated user to obtain download URLs for any tenant's documents
findings.evidence: Signed-URL endpoint accepts arbitrary path parameter referencing a foreign org's storage bucket and returns a working time-limited URL. CWE-285+CWE-639. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-35 — Missing membership check on POST document fetch allows authenticated user to read foreign-org documents
findings.evidence: Same root cause as F-22 via POST method. CWE-285. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-37 — Server creates real cs_live_ Stripe sessions from attacker-controlled line items
findings.evidence: Order-checkout endpoint constructs the Stripe session from the request body's items and prices without re-pricing server-side. Returns a real live cs_live_... session URL with attacker-chosen amounts. CWE-840. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-38 — Order-confirm endpoint returns confirmId without verifying Stripe payment
findings.evidence: POST /api/order/confirm with attacker-controlled session_id returns a confirmId and progresses the order to fulfillment without calling stripe.checkout.sessions.retrieve(id) to verify payment_status=="paid". CWE-840. CVSS 8.1.

findings.title: F-40 — GET /api/setup-intent?orgId= accepts arbitrary orgId and binds payment instruments to victim org
findings.evidence: GET /api/setup-intent?orgId=<victim_org> returns a Stripe SetupIntent client secret bound to the victim's Stripe customer. Attacker attaches a card the victim org will then be charged against, or detaches the victim's existing payment method. CWE-285+CWE-639. CVSS 7.5.

findings.title: F-4 — Operator emails enumerable cross-tenant via internal API
findings.evidence: 34 operator emails returned to a free account; chain enabler for F-32 phishing. CWE-200. CVSS 5.3.

findings.title: F-14 — System margins and tenkara_charge_accounts disclosed to free users
findings.evidence: Reveals platform economics that should be operator-only. Chains with F-18. CWE-200. CVSS 5.3.

findings.title: F-21 — Missing rate limit / authorization on bulk signing-request creation
findings.evidence: Authenticated user mass-creates signing requests against arbitrary recipients. CWE-770. CVSS 5.3.

findings.title: F-24 — /api/orders Next.js layer leaks cross-org orders (downgraded — covered by F-12)
findings.evidence: Independent code path from PostgREST; reading layer leaks cross-org orders. CWE-285. CVSS 5.3.

findings.title: F-26 — operators_view readable with anon JWT (no user auth)
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/operators_view?select=* with only apikey returns operator emails (don@trytenkara.com, arron@trytenkara.com, jennifer@trytenkara.com, mischa.sevilla@gmail.com, mgrazegarcia@yahoo.com). CWE-306. CVSS 5.3.

findings.title: F-29 — Same root cause as F-26; combine into single submission
findings.evidence: Same primitive via the anon JWT path. Bundle with F-26. CWE-306. CVSS 5.3.
